task_completion.description: Navigate to the Job Positions section in Odoo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible, and the agent is on the 'Job Positions' list or kanban view (typically accessed via Employees > Configuration > Job Positions or the Recruitment app).

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new job position
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blank 'New' or 'Create' job position form is visible on the screen, ready for input.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Data Scientist' as the job position name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Data Scientist' is typed into the main Job Position name field on the form.
The Department field on the job position form is filled with 'Research & Development'.

The form is saved (indicated by the absence of 'Save'/'Discard' buttons and the presence of 'Edit' or a read-only view), OR the 'Data Scientist' position is visible in the Job Positions list/kanban view.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Odoo web interface using a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Odoo GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent is operating on the correct local Odoo instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's address bar shows 'localhost:8069' or '127.0.0.1:8069'.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely filled and submitted the form
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the progression of opening the form, filling the fields, and clicking save, rather than jumping straight to a modified DOM or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates on Odoo 17 Community Edition at http://localhost:8069. The agent must log in with credentials admin/admin. The target job position to create is 'Data Scientist' and the target department is 'Research & Development'. The 'Data Scientist' position does not exist in the initial demo data (which contains 7 other positions). The task is successfully completed when the new job position is saved with the correct name and department via the Odoo web interface.
